summary: Iteration 216: Tested Mira Automations toggles (fixed critical bug), Notification Preferences API, CelebrateMobilePage, ProductCard MIRA'S PICK, BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer, and MiraOSPage Concierge tab routing issue.

minor.issue: HTTP 500 on /mira-os page load (icon_state_routes API call fails for some ticket IDs - pre-existing issue, warnings not errors)

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL BUG FIXED: `ReferenceError: pet is not defined` — lines 804 and 806-808 used `pet?.name` but variable `pet` does not exist in scope. Should be `currentPet?.name`. This caused the entire Overview tab to crash with error boundary. Fixed by replacing `pet?.name` with `currentPet?.name` in 3 places.

MiraOSPage.jsx is imported in App.js (line 311) but NOT assigned to any route. The new 'Send to Concierge®' freeform textarea (line 506: conciergeRequest state) and quick action buttons (lines 1537-1600) are INACCESSIBLE via any URL. Route /mira-os still points to MiraDemoPage, not MiraOSPage.

integration_issues.issue: After bug fix, all 3 toggles (Daily Digest, Birthday Reminders, Medication Reminders) render and toggle correctly. State persists via /api/mira/notifications/preferences API.

action_items: CRITICAL: Wire MiraOSPage to a route in App.js. Add: `<Route path='/mira-os-new' element={<ProtectedRoute requireMembership={true}><MiraOSPage /></ProtectedRoute>} />` OR change existing /mira-os route from MiraDemoPage to MiraOSPage — otherwise all concierge freeform tab changes are dead code and inaccessible to users.
Optional: Remove duplicate /mira-os route entry at line 431 in App.js (same as line 413 - redundant).
critical_code_review_comments: OverviewTab.jsx lines 804-808: `pet` variable used but never declared — fixed to `currentPet` (was `pets.find(p => p.id === selectedPetId) || pets[0]`).

App.js line 311: `MiraOSPage` imported with lazy() but never referenced in any `<Route>` — dead import. All new Concierge tab features (freeform textarea, send button, quick action preset buttons) are unreachable.
App.js lines 413 and 431: Duplicate identical Route for `/mira-os` — second entry is unreachable and should be removed.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/dashboard/tabs/OverviewTab.jsx (fixed pet?.name → currentPet?.name in Mira Automations section)

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 tests pass: GET + POST /api/mira/notifications/preferences, concierge pillar-request)
success_rate.frontend: 75% (3/4 features working after bug fix; MiraOSPage concierge tab not accessible via any route)

feature_results.dashboard_mira_automations: PASS (after bug fix) - All 3 toggles visible and functional
feature_results.api_post_preferences: PASS - Saves and persists WhatsApp preferences correctly
feature_results.celebrate_mobile_page: PASS - /celebrate-soul loads without crash, BirthdayCountdown + MiraSoulNudge + CelebrationMemoryWall present
feature_results.product_card_mira_pick: PASS - ✦ MIRA'S PICK expandable row visible and functional on products with mira_hint
feature_results.mira_os_concierge_freeform: FAIL - MiraOSPage.jsx not routed; features unreachable at any URL
feature_results.mira_os_quick_actions: FAIL - Same routing issue; quick action buttons in MiraOSPage.jsx not accessible
feature_results.birthday_box_breed_cake: PASS - Featured breed cake row shows at top of Cakes tab for pet with breed (Indie Birthday Cake)

seed_data_creation: Test notification preferences saved for test_iter216_prefs@test.example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixed: OverviewTab.jsx `pet?.name` → `currentPet?.name`. Main open issue: MiraOSPage.jsx not routed in App.js. Once E1 adds a route, test: /api/concierge/pillar-request POST (returns 404 currently, graceful handling), concierge-freetext-input textarea, concierge-send-btn, quick action preset buttons (Create outdoor pack, Birthday cake, grooming, vet). All backend notification preference tests pass. BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer featured breed cake row and ProductCard Mira's Pick both confirmed working.

bug_1_pet_not_defined.root_cause: E1 added the Mira Automations card and used `pet?.name` in UI text and template literals (lines ~804-808) for the toggle descriptions. However, the component does not have a `pet` variable in scope — the correct variable is `currentPet` (defined as `const currentPet = pets.find(p => p.id === selectedPetId) || pets[0];` on line ~78). In JavaScript, `pet?.name` where `pet` is undeclared throws `ReferenceError: pet is not defined` — optional chaining does NOT protect against undeclared variables.
bug_1_pet_not_defined.fix_applied: Replaced `pet?.name` with `currentPet?.name` in 3 places in Mira Automations section
bug_1_pet_not_defined.reproduction_steps: Visit /dashboard after login — Overview tab crashes with 'Oops! Something went wrong' error boundary

bug_2_mira_os_page_not_routed.root_cause: E1 created/edited MiraOSPage.jsx with new concierge freeform features and imported it in App.js (`const MiraOSPage = lazy(() => import('./pages/MiraOSPage'))`) but forgot to add a Route element that uses `<MiraOSPage />`. The existing `/mira-os` route still uses `<MiraDemoPage />`. Result: all new Concierge tab features (freeform textarea, send button, quick action presets) are dead code.
bug_2_mira_os_page_not_routed.fix_needed: Add route in App.js: `<Route path='/mira-os' element={<ProtectedRoute requireMembership={true}><MiraOSPage /></ProtectedRoute>} />` replacing or alongside existing MiraDemoPage route
